mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND category = #{category}
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 1 AND LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (name, category, price, original_price, stock, image_url, description, status, merchant_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{imageUrl}, #{description}, #{status}, #{merchantId})
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, stock = #{stock}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
